title: CDK Executor Schema
description: Deploy and manage game servers via CDK with interactive CLI

action.description: The CDK action to perform (required in non-interactive mode)

service.description: Service name or comma-separated list of services (required in non-interactive mode)

nonInteractive.description: Skip the interactive CLI and use flags directly. Requires --action, --environment, and --service.

dryRun.description: Preview changes without deploying (runs cdk synth instead of deploy)

requireApproval.description: CDK approval level for security-sensitive changes

region.description: AWS region override (defaults to config value)
